reports.title: Iran's 10-Point Plan and the Coerced Ceasefire
reports.subtitle: A ceasefire that reduces immediate harm but rests on coercive legitimacy and unresolved enrichment risk.

reports.title: Sánchez's 'Bucket' Rebuke and the Cost of NATO Dissent
reports.subtitle: Spain's PM refuses to credit Trump for a ceasefire he says Trump caused — testing what alliance solidarity actually requires.
